title: Task Contract
description: Describes a single bounded task for a Hermes worker sub-agent. The orchestrator builds this from the adapter config and the current hypothesis queue.

hypothesis_id.description: The hypothesis being tested, e.g. scalp-vol-breakout-017

risk_level.description: Risk classification. Controls gate depth: low=T1 only, medium=T1+T2, high=T1+T2+T3, critical=always T4

objective.description: What the worker must accomplish, in measurable terms

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns for files the worker may read and write

forbidden_paths.description: Glob patterns for files the worker MUST NOT touch

items.description: Paths to files the worker must read before acting. The orchestrator verifies these were accessed.

required_context.description: Context files the worker must read before starting. Forms the 'Context Capsule'.

command.description: Template for the deterministic runner command

acceptance.description: List of conditions that must be satisfied for the task to be accepted. Each is a checkable statement.

parent_task_id.description: If this is a sub-task of a larger task, reference the parent
